name: Video - Shopify Click and Collect
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video we walk you through the Click and Collect process, from your customers ordering products online through to fulfilling the order in Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click the cc button on the video toolbar to switch on closed captions, or view the Transcript below the video."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/351547649?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/351547649?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Chapters"}], "data-id": "chapters"}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Timestamp", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Chapter", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "00:00"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "00:19"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify - Product Page"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "01:12"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify - Shopping Cart Page"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "01:42"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify - Checkout"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "02:02"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express - Fulfilment Report"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "02:19"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express - POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "03:11"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Licencing"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "03:17"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express settings"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "03:29"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Installation"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-93a57e7a"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Transcript"}], "data-id": "transcript"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Shopify Connector Click and Collect feature combines the power of Retail Express? inventory management with the Shopify eCommerce platform to offer customers a powerful shopping experience online."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Let's take a look at how it works."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For this example we're using a standard Shopify theme with our brand colours and the default Click and Collect styling. There's a range of options you can enable, disable and style with Click and Collect that we'll cover as we go."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the product page, click the \"Check Stock in Store\" button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter a post code and click search."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The map will update, marking store locations with a pin icon. Underneath the map is a list of Outlets. Each outlet will show the address and contact details as entered in Retail Express. Stock availability is shown on the right-hand side."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also select to show either a general In Stock or Out of Stock message or if preferred, the exact quantity available."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once reviewing the options add the product to the cart."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your customer will need to visit the cart page to select a pickup location so if you have any checkout shortcut buttons like \"Buy it Now\" they'll need to be removed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In my Shopping Cart I have two products that I've selected. As I want to collect my stock from the store I click the \"Store Pickup\" button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Entering the Post Code and searching I can again see a list of Outlets."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This time it displays the Stock Availability for all products in the cart marked with either a tick or a cross."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "I select my Outlet and click Check Out."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Check Out process remains the same in Shopify so the customer will be required to select a shipping method. For this, we recommend setting up a free price-based shipping zone."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the order has been placed Shopify emails the customer with an order confirmation and the order is synchronised to Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the order is in Retail Express it's ready for the staff to process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This can be done in either of 2 ways:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first option is using the Fulfilment Report which is ideal if you're fulfilling stock from an Unmanned Warehouse and don't have access to POS."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The second option, the more common option, is to use the Point of Sale (POS)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From the POS home landing page an alert will be displayed on the side when there's a web order to be actioned."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Clicking the alert, we can see our online order. Opening the order and looking at the Fulfilment icon we can see this is a Pickup order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the Fulfilment tab we can see that our products are Available so we'll get the stock and set them aside for the customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As an optional step, we can click the invoice tab and email the customer to let them know their order is ready to collect."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When the customer collects their purchase we simply fulfil the order in Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express will synchronise to Shopify to mark the order as shipped and Shopify will email the customer to confirm."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Click and Collect feature you'll need to purchase a licence from Retail Express. Contact our Sales team for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once your licence is active you'll be able to configure your Outlet options from within the Shopify Integration settings in Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In Shopify you'll need to edit your theme code to install the add-on and customise how Click and Collect appears within your store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express provides the code required but we strongly recommend engaging an experienced web developer to install and customise Click and Collect for you."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Detailed information on the entire Click and Collect feature including the installation code can be found within our Knowledge Base"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Read full details about the Shopify Click and Collect feature "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}]
